name: Mortgage Calculator
desc: Calculate your monthly mortgage payment, total interest and overall cost.
seo_description: Calculate cuota_mensual, principal_eur with our free mortgage calculator. Just enter precio_vivienda, entrada_pct, interes_anual_pct and get results instantly.
example_label: Calculate monthly payment for 200,000 EUR at 3% for 30 years.
result_context: The cuota_mensual of {cuota_mensual} represents your monthly mortgage payment including main and interest. total interest paid over the loan life will be {total_intereses}.
steps: {'step': 3, 'description': 'Calculate total number of payments', 'calculation': '28 years × 12 = 336 months'}
mistakes: Forgetting to include property taxes and insurance in total monthly housing costs
Using the home price instead of the loan main (after down payment) in calculations
Not accounting for the total interest paid over the entire loan term
